design.background: Deep Navy with subtle glow at the bottom
design.headline: Stop the leak.

assets_and_icons.usage: Use vector icons for categories. E.g., 'airplane' for travel, 'cart' for grocery, 'car' for fuel.
assets_and_icons.card_logos: Use text-based logos (e.g., 'HDFC', 'SBI') styled nicely with typography, no need for actual image assets as they degrade app performance and premium feel.

instructions_to_main_agent: TECH STACK: React Native (Expo), React Navigation, @react-native-community/slider, expo-linear-gradient, react-native-svg.
STYLING: Use standard React Native StyleSheet. Do NOT use HTML/Tailwind classes (div, span). Use View, Text, ScrollView.
FONTS: Install @expo-google-fonts/outfit and @expo-google-fonts/manrope. If not possible, use system fonts but maintain heavy contrast between headings (Bold/Black) and body (Regular).
TESTING: Add testID='...' (React Native equivalent of data-testid) to all interactive elements, buttons, inputs, and major sections.
LAYOUT RULE: Never center everything. Use left-aligned typography for data and charts. Center only the Paywall headline and CTAs.
COLORS: Stick strictly to the Archetype 5 palette defined in this JSON. No default pure black or gray.
BORDERS: Containers with borders must have generous padding (min 16px, preferably 24px).
PERFORMANCE: Use native driver for animations (e.g., Pulse effect on Leakage meter).
